messages.content: # Here is how to cancel your subscription on Patreon

# Patreon
## Step 1
> Press on the **Settings** located at the Top Left Side
## Step 2
> Select on **Memberships** located at the Top Right Middle Side

## Step 3
> On this page, you should see your Subscriptions, press on **View Details** and then **edit**
## Step 4
> Underneath **Update**, it should show **Edit** or **Cancel Membership **, press on it

## Step 5
> It should show you a page called **Manage your membership** press on the circle that says **Cancel Membership** and then **Cancel your membership** located at the bottom right side.
